title: SQL: server aborts on nested query without FROM in subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE way_tags (way INT NOT NULL, k VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (way, k));
SELECT * FROM way_tags WHERE way IN (SELECT way FROM way_tags WHERE k = 'bridge');
SELECT * FROM way_tags WHERE way IN (SELECT way FROM way_tags WHERE k IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Nested query without FROM in subquery
